title: OTel-First Metrics Pipeline
description: Migrate metrics aggregation from hook-first to OTel-first data sourcing. Dual dispatch table, cost suppression, error/tool enrichment, source-agnostic health.

steps.title: SessionMetrics type foundation
steps.description: Rename hookEventCount to totalEventCount in SessionMetrics. Add apiErrorCount, apiRequestCount fields (default 0). Update createInitialMetrics and applyCommonFields to use totalEventCount.
acceptance_criteria: SessionMetrics has totalEventCount field (not hookEventCount)
SessionMetrics has apiErrorCount and apiRequestCount fields defaulting to 0
createInitialMetrics produces metrics with all new fields at zero
applyCommonFields increments totalEventCount (not hookEventCount)
All existing tests pass with renamed field

steps.title: Dual dispatch table with cost suppression
steps.description: Add isOtelActive parameter to aggregateEvent. Create otelEventHandlers table where prompt_submit, tool_call_end, tool_call_start are identity and agent_complete updates count only (no token/cost). Select table based on flag. Update hookProcessor to pass isOtelActive.
acceptance_criteria: When OTel active, prompt_submit/tool_call_end do not contribute to sessionCost or totalTokens
When OTel active, agent_complete updates activeAgentCount but not sessionCost
When OTel not active, all hook events contribute as before (backward compatible)
Mid-session OTel activation preserves pre-OTel accumulated cost
api_request without cost_usd falls back to pricing model

steps.title: API error and request count tracking
steps.description: In otelEventHandlers, api_error increments apiErrorCount. In both tables, api_request increments apiRequestCount. apiErrorRate computed on read as apiErrorCount / (apiErrorCount + apiRequestCount).
acceptance_criteria: api_error events increment apiErrorCount in SessionMetrics
api_request events increment apiRequestCount in SessionMetrics
apiErrorRate derivable as apiErrorCount / (apiErrorCount + apiRequestCount)
Zero errors yields apiErrorCount 0
Common fields (totalEventCount, lastEventAt) updated on api_error

steps.title: Rich tool tracking from tool_result
steps.description: In otelEventHandlers, tool_result increments toolCallCount. In otelEventHandlers, tool_call_start is identity. When OTel not active, tool_call_start increments toolCallCount as before.
acceptance_criteria: When OTel active, tool_result increments toolCallCount
When OTel active, tool_call_start does not increment toolCallCount
When OTel not active, tool_call_start increments toolCallCount as before
toolCallCount reflects only the active source's tool events

steps.title: OTel session timing preference
steps.description: api_request handler sets sessionStartedAt when empty (first OTel event). session_start sets sessionStartedAt only if not already set. Ensures earliest meaningful timestamp wins.
acceptance_criteria: First api_request sets sessionStartedAt when OTel active
session_start does not overwrite sessionStartedAt if already set by api_request
When OTel not active, session_start sets sessionStartedAt as before
sessionStartedAt reflects earliest meaningful timestamp

steps.title: Source-agnostic data health indicator
steps.description: Replace WarningClusterData.hookHealth with dataHealth ('healthy'|'degraded'|'no-data'). buildWarningCluster uses totalEventCount + lastEventAt + now + threshold. Update gaugeCluster, dashboard, GaugeClusterView, UsageDashboardView.
acceptance_criteria: dataHealth shows 'healthy' when events flowing and recent (any source)
dataHealth shows 'degraded' when last event older than staleness threshold
dataHealth shows 'no-data' when no events received
Hook-only sessions show 'healthy' when events flow (backward compatible)
buildWarningCluster is pure function with now parameter

validation.notes: 6 steps, 7 production files, ratio 0.86. Quality gate passed: no AC coupling, ratio <2.5, no identical patterns, all steps have files, IDs valid.
